creator: victor@nett.ca
text:
I had reported this problem before
as http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=111337 with my old hardware,
but was unable to submit follow-up so the ticket expired. Since then,
the hardware was completely replaced (except for adaptec SCSI controller
and two hard disks) and the system exhibits similar behaviour i.e. freezes
without throwing crashdump.

Kernel was compiled with default options only.

I appreciate your help,
pciconf and dmesg listings follow.

How-To-Repeat: on a smb mounted network filesystem (supplied by Win2003 server) run 
tar -zxvf archive.tar.gz
where the archive.tar.gz file is >100MB in size and consists of a few
hundred files
